zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Heaton於1292年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德林加姆。她於1313年與Thomas de Heaton II在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1336年在她的家鄉享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hēah ‘high’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’: Heaton (Yorkshire, Northumberland); Heaton Norris, Heaton under Horwich, Heaton with Oxcliffe, Great Heaton, Little Heaton (all Lancashire); Capheaton, Kirkheaton (Northumberland); Cleckheaton, Hanging Heaton, Kirkheaton (Yorkshire). This surname was taken to Ireland in the mid 17th century, and within Ireland is now mainly found in Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Heaton was born in 1292, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. She married Thomas de Heaton II in 1313, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1336, in her hometown, at the age of 44.

ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Heaton(은)는 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1313년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Thomas de Heaton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Heaton родилась в 1292 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Heaton II в 1313 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1336 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
